bottom_2026.falsifier: a daily-close cycle low outside roughly Jul-Dec 2026
bottom_2026.strength: weaker test (bear-duration clustering is partly process-intrinsic)

top_2029.rule: 525-546 days after the next halving (halving-relative; calendar provisional)
top_2029.falsifier: top >90 days off the window, or SPRING at the next top exceeding +0.43
top_2029.strength: the sharp test (where the thesis lives or dies)
